properties.name: atmosphere.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable Atmosphere auto-configuration.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.rag.safety.enabled
properties.description: Whether to wrap every @AiEndpoint ContextProvider with the RAG injection-safety screen (OWASP Agentic A04). On by default; set false to disable.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.rag.safety.tier
properties.description: Injection-classifier tier: RULE_BASED (default, zero-dependency), EMBEDDING_SIMILARITY (needs an EmbeddingRuntime), or LLM_CLASSIFIER (needs an AgentRuntime). Higher tiers downgrade to RULE_BASED when their runtime is absent.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.rag.safety.on-breach
properties.description: Action for a flagged document: DROP (default), FLAG (annotate metadata), or SANITIZE (replace content with a placeholder).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.rag.safety.fail-open
properties.description: Admit documents when the classifier errors. Default false (fail-closed) — an undetectable injection is worse than a missed retrieval.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.memory.safety.enabled
properties.description: Whether to screen every fact written to a LongTermMemory store for indirect prompt injection (OWASP Agentic A03 — Memory Poisoning) before it is persisted and re-injected. On by default; set false to disable.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.memory.safety.tier
properties.description: Injection-classifier tier for the memory write path: RULE_BASED (default, zero-dependency), EMBEDDING_SIMILARITY (needs an EmbeddingRuntime), or LLM_CLASSIFIER (needs an AgentRuntime). Higher tiers downgrade to RULE_BASED when their runtime is absent.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.memory.safety.on-breach
properties.description: Action for a flagged fact: DROP (default), FLAG (persist with a marker prefix), or SANITIZE (persist a non-actionable placeholder).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.memory.safety.fail-open
properties.description: Admit facts when the classifier errors. Default false (fail-closed) — an undetectable poisoned fact is worse than a dropped memory.

properties.name: atmosphere.servlet-path
properties.description: URL mapping for the Atmosphere servlet.

properties.name: atmosphere.packages
properties.description: Comma-separated list of packages to scan for Atmosphere annotations (@ManagedService, @AtmosphereHandlerService, etc.).

properties.name: atmosphere.order
properties.description: Servlet load-on-startup order.

properties.name: atmosphere.session-support
properties.description: Whether to enable HTTP session support for Atmosphere resources.

properties.name: atmosphere.broadcaster-class
properties.description: Fully qualified class name of the Broadcaster implementation to use.

properties.name: atmosphere.broadcaster-cache-class
properties.description: Fully qualified class name of the BroadcasterCache implementation to use.

properties.name: atmosphere.websocket-support
properties.description: Whether to enable WebSocket transport support.

properties.name: atmosphere.heartbeat-interval
properties.description: Heartbeat interval for keeping connections alive. Defaults to seconds if no unit suffix is specified (e.g. '30' means 30s).

properties.name: atmosphere.init-params
properties.description: Additional Atmosphere servlet init parameters (escape hatch for any ApplicationConfig property).

properties.name: atmosphere.durable-sessions.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable durable session support (survive server restarts).

properties.name: atmosphere.durable-sessions.session-ttl
properties.description: Time-to-live for durable sessions. Defaults to minutes if no unit suffix is specified (e.g. '1440' means 1440 minutes).

properties.name: atmosphere.durable-sessions.cleanup-interval
properties.description: Interval between expired session cleanup runs. Defaults to seconds if no unit suffix is specified (e.g. '60' means 60s).

properties.name: atmosphere.grpc.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable the Atmosphere gRPC transport server. Requires atmosphere-grpc on the classpath.

properties.name: atmosphere.grpc.port
properties.description: Port for the gRPC server.

properties.name: atmosphere.grpc.enable-reflection
properties.description: Whether to enable gRPC server reflection (useful for grpcurl and debugging).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.enabled
properties.description: Whether to enable Atmosphere AI auto-configuration. Requires atmosphere-ai on the classpath.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.mode
properties.description: LLM mode: 'remote' (cloud API) or 'local' (Ollama).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.model
properties.description: LLM model name (e.g. gemini-2.5-flash, gpt-4o, llama3.2).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.api-key
properties.description: API key for the LLM provider. Falls back to LLM_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, or GEMINI_API_KEY environment variables.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.base-url
properties.description: Override the LLM API base URL. Auto-detected from mode and model name when not set.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.path
properties.description: URL path for the default AI chat endpoint.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.system-prompt
properties.description: System prompt for the default AI chat endpoint.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.system-prompt-resource
properties.description: Classpath resource path for the system prompt (takes precedence over atmosphere.ai.system-prompt).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.conversation-memory
properties.description: Whether to enable conversation memory for the default AI chat endpoint.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.max-history-messages
properties.description: Maximum number of messages to retain in conversation memory per client.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.timeout
properties.description: Suspend timeout in milliseconds for the AI chat endpoint.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.harness.enabled
properties.description: Tri-state app-wide harness switch bridged to the org.atmosphere.ai.harness.enabled init-param. Unset (default): @Agent endpoints carry the full harness, bare @AiEndpoints stay off. true: everything on — bare @AiEndpoints get the full harness too, and durable runs are implied unless atmosphere.durable-runs.enabled is set explicitly. false: kill switch — harness primitives off everywhere, beating annotations. Never enables code execution.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.harness.exclude-paths
properties.description: Endpoint paths excluded from the harness; beats annotations (only the false kill switch is stronger).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.harness.compaction
properties.description: Conversation-memory compaction strategy bridged to the org.atmosphere.ai.compaction init-param: sliding-window or summarizing. Unset = framework default (sliding-window).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.harness.prompt-cache-default
properties.description: Default prompt-cache policy bridged to the org.atmosphere.ai.prompt-cache.default init-param, seeding endpoints whose annotation declares none: none, conservative, or aggressive. Unset = framework default.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.enabled
properties.description: Bridge for the org.atmosphere.ai.code.enabled system property (code_exec tool master switch). Off by default and NOT enabled by the harness preset; a system property already set on the JVM wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.engine
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.engine: auto (framework default), docker, or podman. Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.image
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.image (sandbox container image). Framework default is the pinned Playwright image. Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.network
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.network (container network mode). Framework default none (no network). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.memory
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.memory (memory cap, container-engine syntax, framework default 512m). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.cpus
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.cpus (CPU cap, framework default 1.0). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.pids-limit
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.pidsLimit (max processes in the sandbox, framework default 256). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.exec-timeout-seconds
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.execTimeoutSeconds (per-command wall-clock budget, framework default 60). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.sandbox-ttl-seconds
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.sandboxTtlSeconds (max sandbox lifetime, framework default 300). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.max-output-bytes
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.maxOutputBytes (per-command stdout/stderr cap, framework default 262144). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.code.setup
properties.description: Bridge for org.atmosphere.ai.code.setup (optional one-time bootstrap command run via bash -lc when the sandbox starts; operator-supplied only). Unset = don't bridge; a JVM-set system property wins.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.enabled
properties.description: Whether to record every AI streaming session as an append-only session tape (as-produced at the session boundary, post-decorator). Off by default.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.store
properties.description: Tape store backend: sqlite (crash-durable, requires atmosphere-checkpoint) or memory. Falls back to the in-memory store with a NOT-crash-durable warning when atmosphere-checkpoint is absent.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.path
properties.description: SQLite database file path for the sqlite tape store. The literal ${java.io.tmpdir} is expanded to the JVM temp directory.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.max-runs
properties.description: Maximum retained tape runs before the oldest terminal runs are evicted.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.max-steps-per-run
properties.description: Per-run step cap; past it recording stops and the run is flagged truncated (the stream itself is never failed).

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.max-text-chars
properties.description: Per-run text accumulator cap in characters before a forced TEXT-step flush.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.queue-capacity
properties.description: Bounded step-queue capacity between recording sessions and the tape writer; overflow drops steps (never terminals) and counts them.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.idle-timeout
properties.description: OPEN runs with no append for this long are marked ABANDONED.

properties.name: atmosphere.ai.tape.text-flush-interval
properties.description: Minimum age before the tape writer tick flushes accumulated text as a TEXT step.

values.description: Max inbound messages per client per rate-limit window (default: 100). Requires RateLimitingInterceptor.
Rate-limit window duration in seconds (default: 60). Requires RateLimitingInterceptor.
Rate-limit exceeded policy: 'drop' (silent) or 'disconnect' (close connection). Default: drop.
